title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: A video argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) rather than coding alone, and leverage AI agents to move faster while reviewing outputs. It contends that understanding what to build and why is more important than raw coding ability in the age of AI.
